mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chat_message
room_id, sender_id, content, message_type, status, created_at,
#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{status}, #{createdAt},
mapper.select: SELECT cm.id, cm.room_id, cm.sender_id, u.username AS sender_name, u.avatar_url AS sender_avatar, cm.content, cm.message_type, cm.created_at FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = cm.sender_id WHERE cm.id = #{id}

SELECT t.id, t.room_id, t.sender_id, t.sender_name, t.sender_avatar, t.content, t.message_type, t.created_at FROM ( SELECT cm.id, cm.room_id, cm.sender_id, u.username AS sender_name, u.avatar_url AS sender_avatar, cm.content, cm.message_type, cm.created_at FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = cm.sender_id WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} AND cm.status = 0 ORDER BY cm.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset} ) t ORDER BY t.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 0
SELECT MAX(id) FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 0
